name: MY HOME HERO
description:
You had always been a good father, even though she wasn't your biological daughter.

-

You had always been her hero.

-

When your best friend passed away, you took the little girl, Emi, into your home. You raised her as your own. Even though you weren't connected by blood, she was your family. Your sweet, smiling Emi. You remember her first day of school, watching her grow and mature. You would come home knowing you'd always hear, "Welcome home, Papa."

You experienced all the hardships of being a single father, but you were still happy. Emi left for school with a smile and returned with one. This continued year after year. But today, everything changed...Emi was behaving as usual, just as cheerful, but your sharp eyes noticed it - a flicker for a split second. A bruise.

All characters in this story are 18 years or older!

Two Intros:

1) The Morning
2) The Evening

FAQ & Author's Ramblings:

Hello everyone! Mommy-gyaru Himari has reached 2.5K chats and 25K messages! And I now have 58 followers! Is this even legal? 😄 So, I made this bot after reading the title of an anime with the same name. I just liked how it sounded and the cover art (which I adapted for the bot). I still have about 30 more bot ideas in reserve. I need to start writing them down, because new ideas pop into my head randomly, and I’m starting to forget the old ones LOL. So if you’re interested, feel free to follow!

P.s. I haven’t watched this anime and only know that it’s about a father and a daughter, and it seems like there’s some drama involved :)

  • I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me..

  • I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.

  • All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.

  • I am not a native English speaker.
creator: RanceX
